text_block_list.name: Academy Staff
text_block_list.text: All Horsegirls running in the first race, please line up here! We have an absence, so skip number 5 and—…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the 『Selection Race』! It's a very important opportunity for trainers to assess the abilities of Horsegirls and scout them!
choice_data_list: <size=36>(Plus, there are a lot of notable girls this time!)</size>

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Looking good, El Condor Pasa! Your left and right muscle balance is perfect. The second-generation Horsegirl King Halo is running too, huh. That mother's daughter is finally…
choice_data_list: <size=34>(I know, right! I want to talk to those two as well…)</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week just transferred in, but her closing speed is already well-known. Grass Wonder also has a high reputation with an air of greatness even before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And Seiun Sky, who's just here to watch, is another one to keep an eye on. Anyway, I can't afford to miss anyone's run. Naturally, my shoulders tense up—!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text: H… Hey, you!

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer
text_block_list.text: Y-Your nose…! B-Blood!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I touch the bottom of my nose, a glistening, ink-like liquid sticks to my fingers. There's no pain, but the smell of iron and the sensation of something dripping won't stop.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
W-Wait… The infirmary! Go! I'll give you a towel! 
Press this against it!

text_block_list.name: School Nurse
text_block_list.text: Yep, the bleeding has stopped. But please rest for 30 minutes. …Ah, ugh… An emergency call. …Hmm…

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I'm free right now! 
Should I keep them company?

text_block_list.name: School Nurse
text_block_list.text: That'd be a huge help, do you mind? Let me know if anything happens. …And Trainer, you are still on "bed rest," okay?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
If you need anything, just tell me! 
Don't hesitate at all!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Still, what a disaster. 
Getting a nosebleed right before the selection race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been a while since I was treated. Even as we speak, the selection races must be proceeding. I wonder which group is running right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wanted to stay there if possible. But watching while having a nosebleed would only make everyone around me worried.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I'll put your things together over here! 
Your bags go～ …there we are.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: —Whoa.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Look at all these notes… These are the materials for the selection race, right!? There are so many red marks… 
You even noted down El's final sprint time!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Wow～!
choice_data_list: <size=32>T-They're not really meant to be stared at like that…</size>

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ! You're right! This is proof of your hard work. It's like a trade secret or something, right!? I'll forget it in an instant!
choice_data_list: <size=34>No, no, I'm just saying it's nothing that impressive</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
This is!? Eeeh～!? 
Eeeeeh～!!??

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smiling wryly at her wide eyes, I take the documents back. 
As a rookie, I fall short of my seniors in so many ways, but…

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: But still, checking up on not just King and the others, but Spe too is exactly what I'd expect from a pro!

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Spe just transferred in, after all! 
And this note in the corner about Sei is～ …spot on!

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
"Any race Seiun Sky observes is a must-watch"—exactly! 
Sei is really sharp! She's also really good at guessing what'll be on tests!
choice_data_list: <size=38>Ahaha, you sure know a lot about them</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
You bet! Hehe, do you want to hear more? 
Grass is really good at grabbing El's tail and～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She speaks proudly of the Horsegirls who will likely become the representatives of this generation. Then, the topic shifts to the selection race I couldn't watch—

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I bet Spe is going to run freely and smoothly. 
Then El will push ahead with her powerful leading pace…
choice_data_list: <size=34>And Grass Wonder will chase them from behind!</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I know, right! King will attack the exact same way! They'll make their move on the straight! All of them! It'll be an all-out battle of final sprints!!
choice_data_list: <size=38>Whoa～! I really wanted to see that race～～!!</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …Ah. Waaaaah～～! I'm so sorry! I said too much and made you feel disappointed all over again—!

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I-It's okay! Even if it's not the selection race, I'm sure you'll have other chances to watch them! They all love running, after all!

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
They might even have an unofficial race tomorrow! 
That happens all the time! So—!
choice_data_list: <size=38>…! It's okay, I'm not feeling down anymore</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Really? 
Your sadness about missing it hasn't flared up again…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My conversation with her filled me with excitement rather than sorrow. When I explain that, the girl in front of me blushes with a blooming smile.

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Phew… Then I'm glad! 
Ehehe… Thank goodness～
choice_data_list: <size=38>Ah… By the way, may I ask your name?</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: …? My name?
choice_data_list: <size=36>Yeah, I thought this might be some kind of fate</size>

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: —! In that case!!

text_block_list.name: Girl Named Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
It's written in the materials you have! 
In the first race, look—Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down at the materials in my hand. 
Across that name in the first race—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: —there is a single red line drawn, indicating her withdrawal.

text_block_list.name: Academy Staff
text_block_list.text: All Horsegirls running in the first race, please line up here! We have an absence, so skip number 5 and—…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha… I really wanted to run, but… 
my leg started hurting. The doctor put a stop to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The 『Selection Race』 is an important opportunity for trainers looking to scout. And for Horsegirls who want to be scouted, it means even more—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But! This isn't the end! 
Even if my road to debut gets longer, I won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many opportunities I miss. 
No matter how amazing the girls around me are.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I'll become a rising star who catches the eye of someone like you!
